CREATE TABLE test_bitstrings (id INT, bitstring BIT);
SELECT id, bit_length(bitstring) AS length FROM test_bitstrings;
SELECT id, bit_length(bitstring) + 1 AS adjusted_length FROM test_bitstrings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, bitstring, bit_length(bitstring), bit_length(bitstring) * 2 AS double_length FROM test_bitstrings WHERE bit_length(bitstring) > 3;
WITH cte AS (SELECT id, bit_length(bitstring) AS length FROM test_bitstrings) SELECT id, length FROM cte WHERE length = (SELECT MAX(length) FROM cte);
SELECT id, CASE WHEN bit_length(bitstring) % 2 = 0 THEN 'Even' ELSE 'Odd' END AS length_type FROM test_bitstrings;
CREATE VIEW bit_length_view AS SELECT id, bit_length(bitstring) AS length FROM test_bitstrings;
SELECT a.id, b.length FROM test_bitstrings a JOIN (SELECT id, bit_length(bitstring) AS length FROM test_bitstrings) b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.id < 3;
